Prerequisites: Azure CLI logged in with a valid subscription (az login already cached in sandbox)

Steps.Description: Create a new Azure Developer CLI environment for the project
Set Azure subscription for the azd environment
Steps.Command: bash -lc "azd env set AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID $(az account show --query id -o tsv)"

Steps.Description: Set Azure tenant for the azd environment
Steps.Command: bash -lc "azd env set AZURE_TENANT_ID $(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)"

Steps.Description: Relocate node_modules to an internal cache directory within the repo using a safer find loop
Steps.Command: bash -lc "set -e; find . -maxdepth 5 -name package.json -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' pj; do d=$(dirname \"$pj\"); [ -z \"$d\" ] && continue; tgt=\"$d/.cache_node_modules\"; mkdir -p \"$tgt\"; rm -rf \"$d/node_modules\"; ln -sfn \"$tgt\" \"$d/node_modules\"; echo \"  -> $d/node_modules -> $tgt\"; done"

Steps.Description: Provision Azure resources first so the Container Registry and AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_NAME env value exist
Build ui-angular image using ACR remote build using the registry name from azd environment
Steps.Command: bash -lc "cd /workspace/packages/ui-angular; REG=$(azd env get-values | grep AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_NAME | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d '\"'); az acr build --registry $REG --image ui-angular:azd-$(date +%s) --file Dockerfile . --no-logs"

Steps.Description: Update the ui-angular Container App to use the newly built image
Steps.Command: bash -lc "REG=$(azd env get-values | grep AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_NAME | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d '\"'); RG=$(azd env get-values | grep AZURE_RESOURCE_GROUP | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d '\"'); LOGIN=$(az acr show -n $REG --query loginServer -o tsv); TAG=$(az acr repository show-tags -n $REG --repository ui-angular --orderby time_desc --top 1 -o tsv); az containerapp update -n ui-angular -g $RG --image $LOGIN/ui-angular:$TAG"

Steps.Description: Provision Azure resources and deploy all services using Azure Developer CLI
Ensure container images are built and pushed (azd deploy – idempotent verification after azd up)

VerifyHints: source: inferred from azure.yaml, infra/*.bicep, and containerized services configuration
